title: 「There is / are」句型
titleEn: Using There is / are to express existence

source.file: Sentence Sturcture 38 -「There is _ are」表達「有／存在」.pdf

formula: There is + a/an/one + singular noun + place/time/other information

formulas.formula: There is + a/an/one + singular noun + place/time/other information
There is + quantity word + uncountable noun + place/time/other information
There are + number/quantity word + plural noun + place/time/other information

formulas.labelZh: 地點或時間片語置於句首
formulas.formula: Place/Time phrase + , + there is/are + noun + other information

example: There are a lot of reasons why early education matters.
exampleZh: 早期教育重要的原因有很多。

examples.en: There are a lot of reasons why early education matters.
examples.zh: 早期教育重要的原因有很多。
examples.highlight: There are a lot of reasons

examples.en: There is a supermarket near my home.
examples.zh: 我家附近有一間超級市場。

examples.en: There is some water in the bottle.
There are three books on the desk.
Near the station, there are several restaurants.

meaning.zh: There is / are 用來自然地引出某個人物、物件、問題、機會或其他事物的存在。

rules.en: Use there is with singular or uncountable nouns.
rules.zh: 單數名詞或不可數名詞使用 there is。
examples: There is a problem with the computer.
There is some useful information on the website.

rules.en: Use there are with plural nouns.
rules.zh: 複數名詞使用 there are。
examples: There are several problems with the computer.

rules.en: Add an article before a singular countable noun.
rules.zh: 單數可數名詞前通常需要冠詞。
examples: There is a chair near the window.

rules.zh: 保留原句的數量意思；不要把 one 改成 several，也不要把 no 改成 some。
examples: two books → there are two books
no chairs → there are no chairs

rules.en: ‘There’ does not usually mean 「那裏」 in this structure.
rules.zh: 這個句型中的 there 通常不是指「那裏」，而是用來引出一項新資料；真正地點由其他片語表示。
examples: There is a bank near the station.

rules.en: This exercise practises present forms: there is, there are, there is/are no and there is/are not enough.
rules.zh: 本練習集中訓練現在式，不要求使用 there was、there were、there has been 或 there will be。

rules.en: A place or time phrase may come first.
rules.zh: 地點或時間片語可以放在句首，先強調地點或時間。
examples: There is an emergency exit at the end of the corridor.
At the end of the corridor, there is an emergency exit.

benefits.zh: 自然地告訴別人某個人物、物件、問題或機會存在。
可用來描述房間、建築物、社區或圖片中有甚麼，令場景描述更清楚。

benefits.en: It helps organise reasons, problems and choices.
benefits.zh: 適合介紹一系列原因、問題、差異、選擇或可能的解決方法。

benefits.en: It places attention on what exists.
benefits.zh: 把重點放在某個環境或場景中「有甚麼」。

benefits.en: It gives you a useful speaking frame.
benefits.zh: 可使用 There is one problem...、There are several reasons... 等框架，更快組織答案。

en: Rewrite each sentence using there is/are without changing its meaning.
Some later answers begin with a place or time phrase, but they must still contain there is/are.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 there is/are 改寫以下句子，不要改變原句意思。
部分較後的答案會以地點或時間片語開始，但句中仍須使用 there is/are。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.promptZh: 課室裏有一塊大白板。
